Query Functions

The query functions include the provide a low-level interface into Xbox Live. Most titles do not need to use them.

Function Description
XOnlineQueryAdd Adds an entry to a dataset.
XOnlineQueryAddGetResults Retrieves the results of the task started by XOnlineQueryAdd.
XOnlineQueryFindFromIds Queries a dataset using a list of entity IDs and a query procedure.
XOnlineQueryFindFromIdsGetResults Obtains the results of the task started by XOnlineQueryFindFromIds.
XOnlineQueryGetResultsBufferSize Retrieves the buffer size required for the results of a search initiated by XOnlineQuerySearch.
XOnlineQueryRemove Enables a title to invoke a query that removes entities (rows) that match a list of parameters from the specified dataset.
XOnlineQueryRemoveId Enables a title to invoke a query that removes an entity (row) from the specified data set.
XOnlineQuerySearch Searches a competition's dataset for entities matching a set of attributes.
XOnlineQuerySearchGetResults Retrieves the results of the task begun by XOnlineQuerySearch.
XOnlineQuerySelect Exceutes a custom operation on a specific entity ID.
XOnlineQueryUpdate Advanced update function that enables the title to invoke a specific query that updates entities (rows) in the dataset.
XOnlineQueryUpdateId Advanced update function that enables the title to invoke a specific query that updates entities (rows) in the dataset.
Unpublished work. © 2000 Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.
